feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: A Rust DNS Server
entry.summary: Capable of handling A records, using external resolvers, or recursively resolving from root nameservers

entry.title: Rusted Rogue - An ASCII Roguelike Game

link.title: Rusted Rogue - An ASCII Roguelike Game

entry.summary: Written using Rust and the Specs ECS library, this game utilizes a variety of algorithms to procedurally generate levels.

entry.title: Chladni Plate Particle Simulation
entry.content:
• Link to videos
  • Include glsl code
  • Explain touchdesigner basics

entry.title: Quantum Computing - Eavesdropping Detection and Information Loss in Optical Networks

link.title: Quantum Computing - Eavesdropping Detection and Information Loss in Optical Networks

entry.summary: Undergraduate research project as part of the Edmonds College Physics department

entry.title: Fourier Analysis Presentation
entry.summary: A presentation given for the Western Washington Community College Student Mathematics Conference
